parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_vars WHERE key='owner_chat_id' LIMIT 1;

SELECT id, apartment_id, COALESCE(apartment_name,'') AS apartment_name,   COALESCE(guest_name,'')  AS guest_name,   COALESCE(guest_phone,'') AS guest_phone,   COALESCE(guest_email,'') AS guest_email,   guest_chat_id, guest_telegram_id,   COALESCE(guest_username,'')   AS guest_username,   COALESCE(guest_first_name,'') AS guest_first_name,   COALESCE(guest_last_name,'')  AS guest_last_name,   guest_opt_in_at,   to_char(checkin_at,'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS checkin_at,   to_char(checkout_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkout_at,   status, source,   COALESCE(journey_sent,'{}'::jsonb) AS journey_sent,   COALESCE(notes,'') AS notes FROM bookings WHERE status='confirmed'   AND checkout_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 days'   AND checkin_at  <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY checkin_at, apartment_id;

UPDATE bookings
SET journey_sent = COALESCE(journey_sent,'{}'::jsonb)   || jsonb_build_object('{{ $("Select Message").item.json.event_key }}', NOW()::text),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $("Select Message").item.json.booking_id }}';
SELECT key, channel, body FROM message_templates WHERE active = TRUE AND lang = 'ru';
